headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to high-dividend stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga provides accurate analyst ratings for top dividend-yielding stocks in utilities sector.
